docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SHARON SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SVC CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY WHENG (PETER) WANG, PROPERTY MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SVC CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, (SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
